transcript.content: Sarah was in the standup, she mentioned she's flying out next week for a conference.
Marco said he just got back from his trip and is jet-lagged.

expected._substring_alt_note: marco substring uses '|' to accept either 'jet' (jet-lagged) OR 'trip' (just got back from his trip). Both are valid extractions of the same source utterance about Marco's recent travel — strict 'jet'-only matching was a fixture-design oversight in Day 4c. Day 5 release-gate fix per .plans/relationships-v3c-research.md §8.
